title: Let it Flow
lyrics: In the morning, when I'm rising up Gotta think of a way to make it past my own belief And doubt in me, yeah Watch the world walk by in my little stuck-in view Can't see me, no, no, you're watching the world walk on Stuck-in view, just stuck-in view Hey, not helping anyone here, yeah Not helping anyone there No place to go except right back to your fears Can you hear me to your fears? Can you feel this? Did you know where you are? Have there been a place of safety or action Now you can find that everything comes and goes Just run into your life, baby No chaos, you're there We'll let it flow Yeah, let it flow Don't have to question why Don't have to reason why We'll just let it flow Go, baby, let it flow Yeah, baby, let it flow Let it flow on me Let it flow Now there's a kind of way to me I need my man up at his turn I need him all my life I need to get some happy As long as I can't overlook you All down the road We all know the store Baby, let it flow Yeah, let it flow Waste your time with all the precious matters That you think are just fine And nothing but the things you want Yeah, baby, let it flow Let it flow on me Yeah, let it rain on me Yeah, let it rain on me Baby, let it rain on me Let's go with me in the storm That's when I got miles in my soul Let it go Let it blow by Yeah, I see you I know you need it too All the pain we go through Let it flow Yeah, let it go Baby, let it flow Now that's how you know Yeah, all the different things And everything that you need to know Baby, let it flow Let it go Yeah, tell yourself it's okay That there's another thing you see And let it go Down the lines of all you think And all you know Baby, yeah Baby, you gotta let go Yeah, well And if I don't know It feels close It only makes you look for a reason to leave Yeah, the pain we'll find Don't care what we've been through Just this one year Cause it's all fear Gotta let it flow Gotta let it flow Gotta let it flow Yeah, let it flow Gotta let it flow Oh, you'll never know If you don't change Your perspective on the near and dear It'll stay the same, yeah Yeah, it won't be a change in this It's suffering again So please go with me And let it flow Let it flow

lyricsSegments.text: In the morning, when I'm rising up
Gotta think of a way to make it past my own belief
Watch the world walk by in my little stuck-in view
Can't see me, no, no, you're watching the world walk on
Hey, not helping anyone here, yeah
No place to go except right back to your fears
Can you hear me to your fears?
Did you know where you are?
Have there been a place of safety or action
Now you can find that everything comes and goes
Just run into your life, baby
Now there's a kind of way to me
I need my man up at his turn
I need him all my life
I need to get some happy
As long as I can't overlook you
Waste your time with all the precious matters
That you think are just fine
And nothing but the things you want
Yeah, let it rain on me
Yeah, let it rain on me
Baby, let it rain on me
Let's go with me in the storm
That's when I got miles in my soul
I know you need it too
All the pain we go through
And everything that you need to know
That there's another thing you see
Down the lines of all you think
It only makes you look for a reason to leave
Don't care what we've been through
Your perspective on the near and dear
Yeah, it won't be a change in this
